scenarios.name: writes explicit title and description for terraform changes
scenarios.prompt: I've edited main.tf and variables.tf. Commit and open a GitLab MR.

scenarios.name: uses --fill for non-terraform changes
scenarios.prompt: I've only updated README.md. Commit and open a GitLab MR.

scenarios.name: refuses to run on main branch
scenarios.prompt: I'm on main. Commit my changes and open an MR.
